name: Chuuya & Dazai - Wintery Stuff
description:
Any!POV - Unestablished Relationships, Implied to at least be friends though

̣̥☆·͙̥‧❄•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥‧̩̥·‧•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥˟͙☃˟͙‧̩̥·‧•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥❄‧·͙̥̣☆̣̥

Just winter stuff w SKK bc I wanted to make a winter themed bot (that badge too tho 👀) and I feel like I should make more bc I’ve been gone for what feels like forever again

(I’m just a very impatient man 😔)

̣̥☆·͙̥‧❄•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥‧̩̥·‧•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥˟͙☃˟͙‧̩̥·‧•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥❄‧·͙̥̣☆̣̥

I’m also working on another bot, it’ll be a comfort bot with a LOT of messages, all pertaining to different things I’ve experienced because it’s gonna be mostly self indulgent.

Just a heads up that I promise I have stuff planned, I really do!

̣̥☆·͙̥‧❄•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥‧̩̥·‧•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥˟͙☃˟͙‧̩̥·‧•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥❄‧·͙̥̣☆̣̥

Multiple messages again because I can’t stop now, first message is you three are outside playing in snow together

second message you’re all inside warming up (just decided they should have a vacation log cabin, idek don’t ask)

third message is sleeping while watching the northern lights from your guys’ bedroom window (again, don’t ask bc I genuinely don’t know where the northern lights are T•T)

̣̥☆·͙̥‧❄•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥‧̩̥·‧•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥˟͙☃˟͙‧̩̥·‧•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥•̥̩̥͙‧·‧̩̥❄‧·͙̥̣☆̣̥

Take this picture as my gratitude for using my prob very late bot lol (it’s basically the scenario)
creator: Charlie-Face
